{{Infobox madra
| name = Orange Light
| introduced = City of Light
}}

''See also: [[Orange Light Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Orange]] [[Light]] is a sentient force associated with the concept of loyalty. It possesses the ability to communicate through speech, offering guidance, judgment, and moral observations regarding relationships and obligations. In combat or physical movement, it can manifest as a visible energy used by [[Alin]] to land on structures, levitate himself, or manipulate others. For instance, it can create a bubble of energy to lift an individual into the air without [[binding]] them. This power is finite and can flicker or run out during use.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Orange]] [[Light]] serves as a versatile power that [[Alin]] uses to move objects on cushions, levitate locks, and travel upon its own waves. While it can form bubbles to lift or snare targets, the energy once failed during a critical moment, though it later wrapped around [[Simon]]. Beyond its physical utility, the light manifests as a voice reminiscent of [[Alin]]'s friends, eventually accusing him of becoming an enemy to his allies. Despite this reprimand, the light informs [[Alin]] that he is needed to even the odds, allowing him to catch himself mid-air and fly upon wings of [[Orange]] [[Light]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Orange Light]] can be used to move objects on a cushion.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Orange Light]] is a power [[Alin]] uses to levitate locks.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can levitate on a wave of [[Orange Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Orange Light]] can create a bubble that lifts and snares.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Orange Light]] failed.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] is wrapped in [[Orange Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Orange Light]] is a voice that reminds [[Alin]] of his friends.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Orange Light]] told [[Alin]] he proved himself an enemy to those who should be his friends.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Orange Light]] told [[Alin]] they need him to even the odds.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can catch himself with [[Orange Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] flew on wings of [[Orange Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
